en.extract:
The black scrub robin (Cercotrichas podobe) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
It is native to the Sahel and montane Arabian Peninsula.
Its natural habitat is dry savanna.

The '''black scrub robin''' ('''''Cercotrichas podobe''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].
It is native to the [[Sahel]] and montane [[Arabian Peninsula]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is dry [[savanna]].
